name: codex-desktop-official-linux-packager
description: Linux packaging harness for the official Codex Electron desktop bundle.

scripts.rebuild-native: npm run patch-native-sources && NODE_OPTIONS="--experimental-require-module ${NODE_OPTIONS:-}" CC=${CC:-x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-gcc} CXX=${CXX:-x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-g++} electron-rebuild -v 42.0.1 -w better-sqlite3 -w node-pty && npm run build-spawn-helper
